description: (_, RED, GREEN) is forbidden: a RED Tier 2 forces fail-fast (§ 5 R2) — the behavioral tier never runs against a known production hazard — so t3 cannot be GREEN. A conformant implementation MUST reject this triple.
why: § 6 R9 names (_, RED, GREEN) as unreachable; § 5 R2 fail-fast makes a GREEN behavioral tier after a RED production gate a contradiction.
